'''tadhuvu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:wurali|wurali]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-dh-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wurali|wurali]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| tadhuvu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tædhivith|tædhivith]] || [[word:tædhivij|tædhivij]] || [[word:tædhivish|tædhivish]] || [[word:tædhivi|tædhivi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tadhudhuvuth|tadhudhuvuth]] || [[word:tadhudhuvuj|tadhudhuvuj]] || [[word:tadhudhuvush|tadhudhuvush]] || [[word:tadhudhuvu|tadhudhuvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tadhuvuth|tadhuvuth]] || [[word:tadhuvuj|tadhuvuj]] || [[word:tadhuvush|tadhuvush]] || [[word:tadhuvu|tadhuvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tadhufvuth|tadhufvuth]] || [[word:tadhufvuj|tadhufvuj]] || [[word:tadhufvush|tadhufvush]] || [[word:tadhufvuf|tadhufvuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tadhuvuthu|tadhuvuthu]] || [[word:tadhuvuju|tadhuvuju]] || [[word:tadhuvushu|tadhuvushu]] || [[word:tadhuvuku|tadhuvuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tadhuvuth|tadhuvuth]] || [[word:tadhuvuj|tadhuvuj]] || [[word:tadhuvush|tadhuvush]] || [[word:tadhuvu|tadhuvu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tadhuvuthul|tadhuvuthul]] || [[word:tadhuvujul|tadhuvujul]] || [[word:tadhuvushul|tadhuvushul]] || [[word:tadhuvukul|tadhuvukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tadhuvuthuthu|tadhuvuthuthu]] || [[word:tadhuvujuju|tadhuvujuju]] || [[word:tadhuvushushu|tadhuvushushu]] || [[word:tadhuvuku|tadhuvuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tadhuvuthun|tadhuvuthun]] || [[word:tadhuvujun|tadhuvujun]] || [[word:tadhuvushun|tadhuvushun]] || [[word:tadhuvukun|tadhuvukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tadhuvuthuoro|tadhuvuthuoro]] || [[word:tadhuvujuoro|tadhuvujuoro]] || [[word:tadhuvushuoro|tadhuvushuoro]] || [[word:tadhuvukuoro|tadhuvukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
